calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-15-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-19-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Ilona Brusil, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed with prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-09-2018 Set For Trial On Aug-19-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Continued To May-07-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Ilona Brusil, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to May-07-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: NEWTON LAM; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

JUDICIAL MEDIATION
Off Calendar Jan-15-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D611)

Appearances:
Attorney, Ilona Brusil of the law offices of Ilona Brusil (415-814-0573) is present as counsel for plaintiff

Zack Kremintser, plaintiff is present

Attorney, R. Jason Honey of the law offices of Carbone, Smoke, Smith, Bent & Leonard (510-267-7206) appears as counsel for defendant

Mr. Narayan Natarajan, Litigation Specialist at CSAA Insurance Group is present as defendant's insurance representative

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer in courtroom 611 regarding settlement. The case is not settled with the Court's assistance. The clerk is directed to vacate the trial date and set the matter for hearing on Order to Show Cause Re Dismissal, per California Rule of Court 3.1385.
